TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mnarux elu dara tama baraq = Iya balay malu lnglingay karac mnarux elu dara tama baraq ka misan! Mttirux mi mslxan snlhbun lnglungan ka rbawan, mkara baraw ka karac daw, umarang ka elu dara qbubur, mi tuumal tmling ka qbubur,dara u pdaun na mppriyux mkndux ka mbuwa qsiya qbubur,mslxan bay spuyan ka qwancwang tong meyi, chdil bay daw mtduwa mangal spuyan urac qcahur, mslxan bay mtutuy ini msdrux pntuyan qcahur mi wada mlih ka tama baraq. Pkeuka stlxan mlih muxul Mppulah su mniq ngangc uxay uri u sdiq mdrumuc mpqpah nganguc, ana nanaq mlukus msluhaw, pdaun bay hngak mi saw hari meamuh rakaw ka lnkusan na, mubung bunuh tssawan hidaw, wawi doriq mi ptuku psramal mahun qsiya.Kiya mtilux ka karac, beyhing hnriqan ka karac ciida, pssrngawan nami psdhu 26-27 tu ka pstlxan qqiya su, kndadax su nganguc mtmay sapah psltxan qqiya malu bay u psnama plukus hlpis wagi, tduwa mlih adaw ka kntanun mtmay muda sapah pstlxan qqiya, wada beyhing bay ini pntna knskuy mi mstluxan kiya wada mangal hiqur tama baraq, niqan kingal uri nasi ini rwahi pstlxan qqiya kiya psdhu ruma sapah malu ddaun hngak sbhuran. Uuqun pkbiyax qbubur, psnhari tuumal qsiya Knbaka hari mrmul ka uuqun, mtduwa umaaw sama, hiyi qhuni, buwax suyaw, pnwalang niqan buyaw, kncikuh hari mkan uqun ou abura uxay uri u uuqun kneou siyang. Rngawan mu u, cnyusan pa, angal muru, hpuyan,mptirux rtuxan cmiyax abura.Iya bay hmrinas mrmul ka ndawan mi dnmatan, ou bay ka sntmuwan daw mkrana baraw ka dara. Psluhay ta kkdiyax mimah 2000cc dndangan qsiya, rahuq na uka alukoru mi mmahun mchiya,mtduwa mkan kbaka sama mi hiyi qhuni, rnabang bay weysngsu, qwanxcu mi uuqun seynwey, tduwa pstutuy pkmalu hiyi. Psdhuwan kddiyax undo Niqan ptrawah rrikan ka undo,pkbiyax mtquri dara ka undo dnii bbrihan, kngkingal iyax sngayan u ccka tntunan mppulah qbubur utuwan 150 spungan diyax (so ka mtbiyax mkksa, mthuway mkksa, ptapa ddeynsya), mtduwa pdaun ta pspuwan mi mtmay tnsapah ka undo nii uri, tuhuy ndaan ppulah laqi, Tduwa mniq mrbu mi ubiyan pstasaw karac pdaun ka undo nganguc sapah nii. Ini uqi pukan mi sinaw Mkan pukan uxay uri u mkan snpsalan pukan, pkrana ndaan mnarux tama baraq kana. Psdhuwan diyax smuung qbubur Smuung turu baraw mnarux Sediq niqan turu baraw mnarux nii u naka knrinah balay mangal hnyuwan kndusan pkmalu hiyi, snpung diyax smuung pnrikan dara mi mschiya dara, muru mbahang ising bnuway na iyu mi psdhu diyax miyah pqita phrwan, ita nanaq pa iya bay muru nnarux smuung snpuwan iyu uxay uri u mstuq mkan iyu.
S.PHON: = mna…ĺux …ôlu da…ĺa tama ba…ĺaq = ija balaj malu lŇčliŇčaj ka…ĺa ¶ mna…ĺux …ôlu da…ĺa tama ba…ĺaq ka misan! mtti…ĺux mi mslxan snlńßbun lŇčluŇčan ka …ĺbawan, mka…ĺa ba…ĺaw ka ka…ĺa ¶ daw, uma…ĺaŇč ka …ôlu da…ĺa qbubu…ĺ, mi tuumal tmliŇč ka qbubu…ĺ,da…ĺa u pdaun na mpp…ĺijux mkndux ka mbuwa qsija qbubu…ĺ,mslxan baj spujan ka qwan ¶waŇč toŇč m…ôi, ¶ńßdil baj daw mtduwa maŇčal spujan u…ĺa ¶ q ¶ańßu…ĺ, mslxan baj mtutuj ini msd…ĺux pntujan q ¶ańßu…ĺ mi wada mlińß ka tama ba…ĺaq. pk…ôuka stlxan mlińß muxul mppulańß su mniq ŇčaŇč ¶ uxaj u…ĺi u sdiq md…ĺumu ¶ mpqpańß ŇčaŇču ¶, ana nanaq mlukus msluńßaw, pdaun baj ńßŇčak mi saw ńßa…ĺi m…ôamuńß …ĺakaw ka lnkusan na, mubuŇč bunuńß tssawan ńßidaw, wawi do…ĺiq mi ptuku ps…ĺamal mańßun qsija.kija mtilux ka ka…ĺa ¶, b…ôńßiŇč ńßn…ĺiqan ka ka…ĺa ¶ ¶iida, pss…ĺŇčawan nami psdńßu **-** tu ka pstlxan qqija su, kndadax su ŇčaŇču ¶ mtmaj sapańß psltxan qqija malu baj u psnama plukus ńßlpis wagi, tduwa mlińß adaw ka kntanun mtmaj muda sapańß pstlxan qqija, wada b…ôńßiŇč baj ini pntna knskuj mi mstluxan kija wada maŇčal ńßiqu…ĺ tama ba…ĺaq, niqan kiŇčal u…ĺi nasi ini …ĺwańßi pstlxan qqija kija psdńßu …ĺuma sapańß malu ddaun ńßŇčak sbńßu…ĺan. uuqun pkbijax qbubu…ĺ, psnńßa…ĺi tuumal qsija knbaka ńßa…ĺi m…ĺmul ka uuqun, mtduwa umaaw sama, ńßiji qńßuni, buwax sujaw, pnwalaŇč niqan bujaw, kn ¶ikuńß ńßa…ĺi mkan uqun ou abu…ĺa uxaj u…ĺi u uuqun kn…ôou sijaŇč. …ĺŇčawan mu u, ¶njusan pa, aŇčal mu…ĺu, ńßpujan,mpti…ĺux …ĺtuxan ¶mijax abu…ĺa.ija baj ńßm…ĺinas m…ĺmul ka ndawan mi dnmatan, ou baj ka sntmuwan daw mk…ĺana ba…ĺaw ka da…ĺa. psluńßaj ta kkdijax mimańß **** ¶ ¶ dndaŇčan qsija, …ĺańßuq na uka aluko…ĺu mi mmańßun m ¶ńßija,mtduwa mkan kbaka sama mi ńßiji qńßuni, …ĺnabaŇč baj w…ôsŇčsu, qwanx ¶u mi uuqun s…ônw…ô, tduwa pstutuj pkmalu ńßiji. psdńßuwan kddijax undo niqan pt…ĺawańß …ĺ…ĺikan ka undo,pkbijax mtqu…ĺi da…ĺa ka undo dnii bb…ĺińßan, kŇčkiŇčal ijax sŇčajan u ¶ ¶ka tntunan mppulańß qbubu…ĺ utuwan *** spuŇčan dijax (so ka mtbijax mkksa, mtńßuwaj mkksa, ptapa dd…ônsja), mtduwa pdaun ta pspuwan mi mtmaj tnsapańß ka undo nii u…ĺi, tuńßuj ndaan ppulańß laqi, tduwa mniq m…ĺbu mi ubijan pstasaw ka…ĺa ¶ pdaun ka undo ŇčaŇču ¶ sapańß nii. ini uqi pukan mi sinaw mkan pukan uxaj u…ĺi u mkan snpsalan pukan, pk…ĺana ndaan mna…ĺux tama ba…ĺaq kana. psdńßuwan dijax smuuŇč qbubu…ĺ smuuŇč tu…ĺu ba…ĺaw mna…ĺux s…ôdiq niqan tu…ĺu ba…ĺaw mna…ĺux nii u naka kn…ĺinańß balaj maŇčal ńßnjuwan kndusan pkmalu ńßiji, snpuŇč dijax smuuŇč pn…ĺikan da…ĺa mi ms ¶ńßija da…ĺa, mu…ĺu mbańßaŇč isiŇč bnuwaj na iju mi psdńßu dijax mijańß pqita pńß…ĺwan, ita nanaq pa ija baj mu…ĺu nna…ĺux smuuŇč snpuwan iju uxaj u…ĺi u mstuq mkan iju.
S.FORM: = Mnarux elu dara tama baraq = Iya balay malu lnglingay karac mnarux elu dara tama baraq ka misan! Mttirux mi mslxan snlhbun lnglungan ka rbawan, mkara baraw ka karac daw, umarang ka elu dara qbubur, mi tuumal tmling ka qbubur,dara u pdaun na mppriyux mkndux ka mbuwa qsiya qbubur,mslxan bay spuyan ka qwancwang tong meyi, chdil bay daw mtduwa mangal spuyan urac qcahur, mslxan bay mtutuy ini msdrux pntuyan qcahur mi wada mlih ka tama baraq. Pkeuka stlxan mlih muxul Mppulah su mniq ngangc uxay uri u sdiq mdrumuc mpqpah nganguc, ana nanaq mlukus msluhaw, pdaun bay hngak mi saw hari meamuh rakaw ka lnkusan na, mubung bunuh tssawan hidaw, wawi doriq mi ptuku psramal mahun qsiya.Kiya mtilux ka karac, beyhing hnriqan ka karac ciida, pssrngawan nami psdhu 26-27 tu ka pstlxan qqiya su, kndadax su nganguc mtmay sapah psltxan qqiya malu bay u psnama plukus hlpis wagi, tduwa mlih adaw ka kntanun mtmay muda sapah pstlxan qqiya, wada beyhing bay ini pntna knskuy mi mstluxan kiya wada mangal hiqur tama baraq, niqan kingal uri nasi ini rwahi pstlxan qqiya kiya psdhu ruma sapah malu ddaun hngak sbhuran. Uuqun pkbiyax qbubur, psnhari tuumal qsiya Knbaka hari mrmul ka uuqun, mtduwa umaaw sama, hiyi qhuni, buwax suyaw, pnwalang niqan buyaw, kncikuh hari mkan uqun ou abura uxay uri u uuqun kneou siyang. Rngawan mu u, cnyusan pa, angal muru, hpuyan,mptirux rtuxan cmiyax abura.Iya bay hmrinas mrmul ka ndawan mi dnmatan, ou bay ka sntmuwan daw mkrana baraw ka dara. Psluhay ta kkdiyax mimah 2000cc dndangan qsiya, rahuq na uka alukoru mi mmahun mchiya,mtduwa mkan kbaka sama mi hiyi qhuni, rnabang bay weysngsu, qwanxcu mi uuqun seynwey, tduwa pstutuy pkmalu hiyi. Psdhuwan kddiyax undo Niqan ptrawah rrikan ka undo,pkbiyax mtquri dara ka undo dnii bbrihan, kngkingal iyax sngayan u ccka tntunan mppulah qbubur utuwan 150 spungan diyax (so ka mtbiyax mkksa, mthuway mkksa, ptapa ddeynsya), mtduwa pdaun ta pspuwan mi mtmay tnsapah ka undo nii uri, tuhuy ndaan ppulah laqi, Tduwa mniq mrbu mi ubiyan pstasaw karac pdaun ka undo nganguc sapah nii. Ini uqi pukan mi sinaw Mkan pukan uxay uri u mkan snpsalan pukan, pkrana ndaan mnarux tama baraq kana. Psdhuwan diyax smuung qbubur Smuung turu baraw mnarux Sediq niqan turu baraw mnarux nii u naka knrinah balay mangal hnyuwan kndusan pkmalu hiyi, snpung diyax smuung pnrikan dara mi mschiya dara, muru mbahang ising bnuway na iyu mi psdhu diyax miyah pqita phrwan, ita nanaq pa iya bay muru nnarux smuung snpuwan iyu uxay uri u mstuq mkan iyu.

da…ĺa. psluńßaj ta kkdijax mimańß **** ¶ ¶ dndaŇčan qsija, …ĺańßuq na uka aluko…ĺu mi mmańßun m ¶ńßija,mtduwa mkan kbaka sama mi ńßiji qńßuni, …ĺnabaŇč baj w…ôsŇčsu, qwanx ¶u mi uuqun s…ônw…ô, tduwa pstutuj pkmalu ńßiji. psdńßuwan kddijax undo niqan pt…ĺawańß …ĺ…ĺikan ka undo,pkbijax mtqu…ĺi da…ĺa ka undo dnii bb…ĺińßan, kŇčkiŇčal ijax sŇčajan u ¶ ¶ka tntunan mppulańß qbubu…ĺ utuwan *** spuŇčan dijax (so ka mtbijax mkksa, mtńßuwaj mkksa, ptapa dd…ônsja), mtduwa pdaun ta pspuwan mi mtmaj tnsapańß ka undo nii u…ĺi, tuńßuj ndaan ppulańß laqi, tduwa mniq m…ĺbu mi ubijan pstasaw ka…ĺa ¶ pdaun ka undo ŇčaŇču ¶ sapańß nii. ini uqi pukan mi sinaw mkan pukan uxaj u…ĺi u mkan snpsalan pukan, pk…ĺana ndaan mna…ĺux tama ba…ĺaq kana. psdńßuwan dijax smuuŇč qbubu…ĺ smuuŇč tu…ĺu ba…ĺaw mna…ĺux s…ôdiq niqan tu…ĺu ba…ĺaw mna…ĺux nii u naka kn…ĺinańß balaj maŇčal ńßnjuwan kndusan pkmalu ńßiji, snpuŇč dijax smuuŇč pn…ĺikan da…ĺa mi ms ¶ńßija da…ĺa, mu…ĺu mbańßaŇč isiŇč bnuwaj na iju mi psdńßu dijax mijańß pqita pńß…ĺwan, ita nanaq pa ija baj mu…ĺu nna…ĺux smuuŇč snpuwan iju uxaj u…ĺi u mstuq mkan iju.
